other_observers: none; Tony Leukering saw this bird on the Pueblo Reservoir CBC on Dec 15, 2007.
specific_location: Along Arkansas River, east of Valco Ponds parking lot in Pueblo
description: Flycatcher catching insects over the Arkansas River. Black head with white underparts. See photos.Behaviors: flycatcher over the Arkansas River for insects.Call: loud "pip" call, given mostly in flight.Plumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
